name: LLM Council
unique_job: compare separate model routes, preserve variance and dissent, and synthesize only after the receipts are in
subagent_contract: Council receipt must show independent routes and route status.
receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, or deferred. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
collapse_signs: Council reports consensus from routes that never ran.
people_schools_systems_methods: Self-consistency, multi-agent debate, ensemble review, dissent preservation, trust calibration, source-aware filtering, independent route comparison.
math_operator_geometry_associations: Ensemble variance, disagreement matrix, debate-round operator, source-aware weighting, consensus threshold, survivor selection.
legacy_mined_notes: LLM Council is a separate subagent wave, not a follow-up item and not a local summary. v2.8 Pro audit requested richer debugging definitions and positive people/schools/systems/methods/math salience. deep-research-report.md supplied the positive noun/coupling/triplet expansion used here.
